records.question: Which menus at Chickatawbut Club for the ANNUAL MEETING & DINNER event have a call number of 1895-018, page counts of at least 4, and include pages with a full width of exactly 2713.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT menu.id FROM menu
JOIN menupage ON menu.id = menupage.menu_id
WHERE menu.location = 'Chickatawbut Club' AND menupage.full_width = 2713.0 AND menu.call_number = '1895-018' AND menu.event = 'ANNUAL MEETING & DINNER' AND menu.page_count >= 4
